title: Sweet Fluffy Spanish Rice Paella
description: A low-calorie, sweet, and fluffy Spanish dish featuring palm sugar, perfect for a monsoon evening. This paella recipe combines the richness of palm sugar with the fluffiness of cooked rice.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add uncooked rice and stir to coat with oil and mix with spices.
Add palm sugar and stir to combine.
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until rice is cooked and fluffy.
Deglaze the pan with a little water if necessary, to remove any stuck rice.
Fluff the rice with a fork and serve hot.
